nasb.text: So the present passed on before him, while he himself spent that night in the camp.

esv.text: So the present passed on ahead of him, and he himself stayed that night in the camp.

cnv.text: 於是禮物先過去了；那天晚上雅各在營中過夜。

ccb.text: 于是，他派人先把礼物送过去，自己则留在营里过夜。

csbs.text: 于是那些礼物在雅各前面先送了过去；而他当晚却在营地中留宿。
